match.userMessage:
Generate the visual prompt for the starting frame of this scene.

<CURRENT_SCENE>
{
  "sceneId": "scene-5",
  "sceneNumber": 5,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM DESK - MOMENTS LATER - QUICK-CUT MONTAGE\n\nLocked shot: Reporter scans lede, eyes widen. Macro detail: glossy ink on paper shimmers under on-camera flash punch. Handheld lifestyle: she smooths sheet like daily ritual, fingers tracing words.\n\n                    REPORTER\n          (to producer, electric)\n        This is it. Tactile fresh. Sensory reset.\n        Live in three... two...\n\nProducer nods, backs away. Producer's hand lingers on chair -- real-life context, linen rumple.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "REPORTER",
        "line": "This is it. Tactile fresh. Sensory reset. Live in three... two...",
        "tone": "electric"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Reporter reacts to story and counts down",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM DESK - MOMENTS LATER",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Reporter gets excited and prepares to go live"
  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

<SCENE_BEFORE>
(Context for position/lighting continuity only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene-4",
  "sceneNumber": 4,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Cut to eye-level: Producer slaps paper on desk. Reporter snatches it -- shallow DOF on hands unfolding, revealing bold headline: \"REVOLUTIONARY SKIN DROP: EFFORTLESSLY COOL.\"",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Paper exchange at desk",
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM DESK",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Reveal the headline of the story"
  }
}
</SCENE_BEFORE>

<SCENE_AFTER>
(Context for action setup only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene-6",
  "sceneNumber": 6,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM - LIVE FEED PREP - HIGH-KEY AIRY\n\nOverhead flat-lay: terminal screen pulses headline graphic -- clean whites, pink accents, light green glow (#E8F4E8). Reporter adjusts earpiece, golden hour warmth bathes face, natural skin tones pop true-to-life. Quick-cut macro: mic clip snaps tactile-close.\n\nShe straightens, cool poise. Red light blinks LIVE.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Live feed preparation and earpiece adjustment",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - LIVE FEED PREP",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Final prep before going on air"
  }
}
</SCENE_AFTER>

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>
